issue.title: Heartbeat refill lane 1377: remaining Python asset sweep 7/10

commands: find src/bigclaw tests scripts bigclaw-go/scripts -type f -name '*.py' 2>/dev/null | sort

blocker.summary: The repository-wide physical Python file count was already zero in this workspace before BIG-GO-1377 changes.

notes: This lane documents an empty remaining Python asset inventory and hardens the Go-only state with regression coverage.
The branch baseline was already Python-free, so this lane strengthens regression coverage and refreshes validation evidence rather than removing in-branch Python files.
Baseline HEAD before lane changes was `f6faec68`.
The first push attempt was rejected because origin/main advanced; the lane was rebased cleanly onto `0dbbbd4f` and revalidated.
A second remote advance required one more clean rebase onto `4953d467`; the final pushed lane head is `eec41977`.
